Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$more = @\(
  @{N='Downloads';P='C:\\\\Users\\\\123\\\\Downloads'},
  @{N='AppData Local';P=\\"\\$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\"},
  @{N='AppData Roaming';P=\\"\\$env:APPDATA\\"},
  @{N='Desktop total';P='C:\\\\Users\\\\123\\\\Desktop'},
  @{N='Windows SxS';P='C:\\\\Windows\\\\WinSxS'},
  @{N='Program Files';P='C:\\\\Program Files'},
  @{N='Program Files x86';P='C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)'},
  @{N='ProgramData';P='C:\\\\ProgramData'}
\)
foreach \(\\$f in \\$more\) {
  if \(Test-Path \\$f.P\) {
    \\$size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path \\$f.P -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Sum
    Write-Output \('{0}: {1:N1} GB' -f \\$f.N, \(\\$size/1GB\)\)
  }
}" 2>&1)
